raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX credit card was cancelled and closed XX/XX/year>. XXXX has failed to acknowledge their own correspondence that the account was closed. XXXX has turned over the account to a collection agency in the name of XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXX XXXX has been supplied with the above mentioned cancellation letter supplied by XXXX. No acknowledgement has been forthcoming from the above collection agency in regards to this credit card cancellation letter. 
This has been an ongoing problem, even after XXXX attempts notifying XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX with documents showing proof of cancelled credit card in XXXX. 
Statement balances continue to increase on this card that was CANCELLED in XXXX, and new card that they mailed to me was NEVER ACTIVATED!!
